input.command:
sleep 3 && echo "=== TESTING DEVICES ENDPOINT ===" && curl -s http://localhost:5000/api/devices | python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
print(f'Status: {data[\"status\"]}')
print(f'Devices found: {len(data[\"data\"][\"devices\"])}')
for device in data['data']['devices']:
    print(f'  - {device[\"name\"]} ({device[\"type\"]}): {device[\"power\"]}W [{device[\"status\"]}]')
"
